induction_input: The book the student read sold.
The cake the chef baked melted.
The letter the secretary typed arrived.
The plan the manager approved failed.
The song the singer recorded played.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a reduced relative clause structure: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a reduced relative clause structure: "The [noun] the [noun] [verb] [verb]."
l2_sentences: The horse the jockey rode won.
The book the student read disappeared.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The car the mechanic fixed broke.
The song the singer performed won.
l1_sentences: The book the student read sold.
